source_pr.title: expression: fix constItem() and column-pruning in `order by` clause
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/10064 Change the semantics of constItem().
A const item can be eval() when build a plan, and it shouldn't contain `correlated column`.
 
Column-pruning in `order by` clause, however, need to identify a "const item" in execute stage. And `IsMutableEffectsExpr` should be enough.

### What is changed and how it works?
Change back constItem() and use `IsMutableEffectsExpr`. And export `isMutableEffectsExpr` as `IsMutableEffectsExpr`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
Pass the test add by #10064.

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR changes `ConstItem`/correlated column semantics and related planner pruning behavior, updating golden EXPLAIN outputs/tests. The diff appears to be correctness/refactor work (and even includes an unrelated added file), without an explicit flaky signature or targeted determinism stabilization, so we classify it conservatively.
